title: Golden Week
impact: All major attractions at maximum capacity. 2-3x normal crowds. Ticket shortages.
action: Warn user. Suggest less popular POIs. Emphasize advance booking.

title: Spring Festival
impact: Many restaurants and small shops closed. Major attractions open but crowded. Transport fully booked.
action: Confirm POI opening hours. Book transport 30+ days ahead.

title: Beijing Summer Heat
impact: 35°C+ common. Outdoor activities exhausting. Air quality may be poor.
action: Schedule outdoor POIs early morning. Add indoor alternatives. Include hydration breaks.

title: Shanghai Plum Rain Season
impact: Continuous light rain and high humidity. Outdoor plans unreliable.
action: Prioritize indoor POIs. Add rain backup options. Include umbrella reminder.

title: Chongqing Summer Furnace
impact: 38-42°C common. Humid heat causes outdoor fatigue quickly. Afternoon walking difficult. Outdoor activities before 10am or after 6pm only.
action: Schedule outdoor POIs before 10am or after 6pm. Prioritize indoor/rest stops midday.

title: Chongqing Fog Season
impact: Frequent fog reduces visibility. Night skyline views may be obscured. The "Mountain City" nickname partly comes from this.
action: Warn users that night views are weather-dependent. Suggest backup indoor plans.

title: Chongqing Rainstorm Season
impact: Sudden heavy rain and slippery stairs common. River views and night photography may be affected.
action: Add indoor backup POIs. Warn users about slippery hillside roads and stairs.

title: Hongya Cave Peak Hours
impact: Fri-Sun evenings (7-10pm) extremely crowded. Bridge viewing area packed shoulder to shoulder.
action: Suggest weekday evenings. Or go at 6pm before peak. View from Qiansi Gate Bridge north end is less crowded.

title: Jiefangbei New Year Countdown
impact: Extremely dense crowds around Jiefangbei and nearby metro stations. Temporary crowd control measures possible.
action: Recommend early arrival, metro transport, and alternative night-view spots.

title: Xi’an Summer Heat
impact: 35°C+ common. Long outdoor walks between attractions may become exhausting. Midday sunlight can be intense.
action: Schedule outdoor POIs early morning or evening. Prioritize museums and indoor stops at noon.Include hydration reminders.

title: Terracotta Warriors Monday Closure
impact: The museum is closed on Mondays. Visitors may need to adjust itinerary plans.
action: Avoid scheduling visits on Mondays. Recommend alternative museums or historical attractions instead.

title: Xi’an Museum Tuesday Closure
impact: The museum is closed on Tuesdays. Visitors may need to adjust itinerary plans.
action: Avoid scheduling visits on Tuesdays. Recommend alternative museums or nearby outdoor attractions instead.

title: Summer Vacation Travel Peak
impact: Major attractions, museums, and transportation hubs become significantly more crowded during summer vacation. Queue times and ticket demand may increase.
action: Recommend advance reservations and early morning visits. Avoid peak afternoon hours when possible.

title: Labor Day Golden Week
impact: Major attractions experience extremely high visitor density. Transportation, hotels, and restaurants may become overloaded.
action: Warn users about heavy crowds and long waiting times. Recommend less crowded alternatives and early departures.

title: Mount Huashan Snowfall
impact: Mountain paths may become icy and slippery. Visibility and hiking safety may be affected during snowfall.
action: Recommend checking weather conditions in advance. Suggest cable car routes and winter hiking equipment.

title: Terracotta Warriors Peak Crowd
impact: Heavy crowds are common between 9:00–14:00, especially on weekends and public holidays. Morning entry queues may exceed 1–2 hours during peak seasons.
action: Recommend early morning weekday visits and advance reservations. Avoid national holidays when possible.

title: Great Tang All Day Mall Peak Crowd
impact: Visitor density increases significantly between 19:00–22:00, especially on weekends and public holidays. Walking speed may become very slow during peak evening hours.
action: Recommend weekday evening visits and public transportation. Arrive before peak hours for better experience.

title: Badaling Great Wall Winter Gale and Snow
impact: Mountain top temperatures drop severely, with strong winds or icy steps. Cable cars may temporarily close due to safety reasons.
action: Recommend checking the weather forecast and cable car status in advance. Advise users to dress in heavy winter gear and wear anti-slip shoes.

title: Shichahai Evening Peak
impact: Visitor density increases significantly between 18:00–22:00, especially on weekends. Walking speed in narrow hutongs becomes very slow.
action: Recommend weekday afternoon visits for shopping and exploring hutongs, or using public transportation (Subway Line 6/8) to avoid heavy traffic jams.

title: Beijing Marathon Traffic Control
impact: Major roads from Tiananmen Square to the Olympic Park (Bird's Nest/Water Cube) will face temporary traffic closures. Public buses and subways near the route will be extremely crowded or bypass certain stations.
action: Advise users to avoid traveling by taxi or bus in the central axis area during the morning.

title: Buddhist Temples Dress Code
impact: Strict religious dress codes are enforced. Wearing inappropriate clothing (off-shoulder shirts, ripped jeans above the knee, transparent clothing) results in immediate entry refusal.
action: Instruct the AI to check the user's daily itinerary. If a temple POI is included, generate a smart reminder: "Please ensure your outfit covers shoulders and knees today to avoid entry denial."

title: The Bund Peak Hours
impact: The Bund becomes very crowded between 19:00–21:00, especially on weekends and public holidays.
action: Recommend SH048 (North Bund Riverside Green Space) during peak hours for a less crowded skyline view.

title: Shanghai Summer Heat
impact: 35°C+ temperatures and high humidity common. Long outdoor walks may become exhausting.
action: Schedule outdoor POIs early morning or evening. Prioritize indoor attractions in the afternoon.

title: Binjiang Winter Wind
impact: Strong riverside winds during winter may reduce comfort for long outdoor walks.
action: Reduce long outdoor stays and recommend nearby indoor attractions if needed.

title: Breakfast Restaurants Before 10 AM
impact: Restaurants that open before 10:00 can be considered suitable breakfast options.
action: For breakfast time slots, recommend restaurants with opening hours before 10:00.

title: Idle Time Optimization
impact: Fills unplanned gaps in the itinerary to prevent tourist disorientation, optimizing local neighborhood merchant placement (cafes, retail) within a 15-minute walking radius.
action: It is appropriate to provide a reminder when the user ends the trip early. The content is that we suggest that the user can spend time in nearby cafes and shops.
